heading: What is
paragraph1: \*\*You will remain clothed during this treatment, so please wear loose shorts and a fitted, comfy shirt so it can be easily worked around.\*\* Manual osteopathic therapy is a gentle, whole-body approach to care. Rather than focusing only on where you feel pain, it considers how different areas of the body are connected and working together. For example, shoulder tension may be influenced by the neck, postural muscles, breathing patterns, or nearby structures such as the ribs, collarbone, heart or gallbladder. When the body is in balance, it can heal and regulate itself more effectively.
paragraph2: Each treatment begins with a thorough assessment and is tailored to your body’s needs that day. By identifying and addressing the root causes of discomfort, whether from stress, strain, or injury, treatment aims to create lasting results. By restoring movement, reducing tension, and supporting overall balance, manual osteopathic therapy helps you feel more comfortable, aligned, and at ease in your body.

features.title: Initial Assessment
features.description: Your first visit includes a thorough discussion of your health history, and a detailed assessment of your posture and physical function to further understand your body.

features.title: Osteoarticular Adjustments
features.description: A gentle way to improve joint movement and position using light muscle contractions instead of high force thrusts, with no cracking involved.

features.title: Myofascial Release
features.description: Slow, sustained stretching of soft tissues to release tension and improve movement — the part of a massage without oil.

features.title: Craniosacral Therapy
features.description: Subtle techniques that release restrictions within the cranial bones(skull), sacrum, and spinal cord to support your nervous system.

features.title: Visceral Manipulation
features.description: Uses gentle myofascial techniques to restore the natural movement and function of your internal organs. Used to support the digestive, respiratory, urinary and reproductive systems!

features.title: Lymphatic Drainage
features.description: Encourages healthy lymphatic flow to help reduce swelling and support your body’s natural detox process.
